name: Apple-Stuffed Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, sauté onion in butter until tender.
2. Remove from heat; add bread, apples, celery, parsley, and 1/4 teaspoon salt.
3. Cut a large pocket in the side of each pork chop.
4. Sprinkle inside and outside with pepper and remaining salt.
5. Spoon stuffing loosely into pockets.
6. Place on hot grill and baste with Apple Jelly until meat juices run very clear.
